recommendations.title: Jeepers Creepers: Reborn
recommendations.overview: Forced to travel to a horror festival with her boyfriend, a young woman begins experiencing premonitions associated with the urban myth of The Creeper. She believes that something supernatural has been summoned — and that she is at the center of it a

recommendations.title: Iron Sky
recommendations.overview: In the last moments of World War II, a secret Nazi space program evaded destruction by fleeing to the Dark Side of the Moon. During 70 years of utter secrecy, the Nazis construct a gigantic space fortress with a massive armada of flying saucers.

recommendations.title: Iron Sky: The Coming Race
recommendations.overview: 29 years after the events of Iron Sky, the former Nazi Moonbase has become the last refuge of mankind. Earth was devastated by a nuclear war, but buried deep under the wasteland lies a power that could save the last of humanity - or destroy it once a

recommendations.title: Ghost in the Shell
recommendations.overview: In the year 2029, the barriers of our world have been broken down by the net and by cybernetics, but this brings new vulnerability to humans in the form of brain-hacking. When a highly-wanted hacker known as 'The Puppetmaster' begins involving them i

recommendations.title: Justice League: The Flashpoint Paradox
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Flash finds himself in a war-torn alternate timeline and teams up with alternate versions of his fellow heroes to restore the timeline.

recommendations.title: Sorry to Bother You
recommendations.overview: In an alternate present-day version of Oakland, black telemarketer Cassius Green discovers a magical key to professional success – which propels him into a macabre universe.

recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: Man's Best Friend
recommendations.overview: A genetic research facility worker exposes animal abuses there to a local TV reporter, who frees and takes in a genetically altered dog from the lab, unaware that he has a violent streak.

recommendations.title: Immortal
recommendations.overview: In the distant future, Earth is occupied by ancient gods and genetically altered humans. When a god is sentenced to death he seeks a new human host and a woman to bear his child.

recommendations.title: The Last Will and Testament of Rosalind Leigh
recommendations.overview: The story of Leon, an antiques collector who inherits a house from his estranged mother only to discover that she had been living in a shrine devoted to a mysterious cult. Soon, Leon comes to suspect that his mother's oppressive spirit still lingers
